name: World's Best Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup light brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour three 8-inch cake pans and line the bottoms with wax paper. Grease and flour wax paper.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flours, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and ginger. Set aside.
4. Combine sugars, buttermilk, oil, eggs, and vanilla in a large bowl; stir until all ingredients are well blended. Add the flour mixture to the buttermilk mixture along with carrots, pineapple, walnuts, coconut, and raisins, stirring just until well mixed.
5. Pour batter into prepared pans. Bake for 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool in pans for 10 minutes.
6. Loosen cake layers from the edges of the pans with a sharp knife and invert onto wire racks. Peel off wax paper and cool completely.
7. To make frosting, combine butter and cream cheese in a large mixing bowl; beat until light and fluffy. Add sugar, orange rind, and vanilla, mixing well. (Makes enough for 1 (3-layer) cake.)
8. Spread frosting between layers and on top and sides of the cake. Garnish with marzipan carrots (optional). Cover and refrigerate overnight before cutting.
